company.name: Full Set Productions
company.description: Edinburgh-based designers and builders of escape rooms, immersive attractions, and theatrical sets.
company.address: Unit 12, Edinburgh Workshop Estate, Edinburgh EH6 XXX

hero.headline: We build escape rooms and immersive attractions
hero.subheadline: From concept to install-ready builds. Durable, safe, and delivered on time.

services.title: Escape Rooms & Immersive Attractions
services.summary: Full design and build service for escape rooms, from puzzle mechanics to themed environments.
services.description: We create complete escape room experiences from the ground up. Our team handles everything from initial concept and puzzle design through to fabrication, electronics integration, and on-site installation.

services.title: Theatre, Festival & Fringe Builds
services.summary: Sets, props, and scenic elements for theatre productions and festival installations.
services.description: With Edinburgh as our home, we're perfectly positioned for Fringe and festival work. Our workshop is minutes from major venues, allowing for rapid turnarounds and easy logistics.

services.title: Props & Scenic Fabrication
services.summary: Custom props, scenic elements, and specialty fabrication for any project.
services.description: From hero props to large-scale scenic pieces, our workshop is equipped for diverse fabrication needs. We work with wood, metal, foam, and mixed media to bring any vision to life.

whyWorkWithUs.title: Built to Last
whyWorkWithUs.description: Our builds are designed for thousands of uses. We engineer durability and safety into everything we create.

whyWorkWithUs.title: Clear Communication
whyWorkWithUs.description: Regular updates, transparent timelines, and no surprises. You'll always know where your project stands.

whyWorkWithUs.title: Deadline Delivery
whyWorkWithUs.description: Opening nights don't move. We plan backwards from your launch date and deliver on time, every time.

whyWorkWithUs.title: Collaborative Process
whyWorkWithUs.description: Your expertise in your audience combined with our build experience creates better outcomes.

edinburghAdvantage.headline: The Edinburgh Advantage
edinburghAdvantage.description: Based in Edinburgh, we're at the heart of the UK's creative scene. Our location means reduced transport costs for Scottish clients, quick turnarounds for Fringe productions, and easy access to our workshop for client visits.
points: Reduced logistics costs for Scottish clients

process.title: Discovery
process.description: We learn about your vision, constraints, and timeline.

process.title: Design
process.description: Concepts, technical drawings, and project planning.

process.title: Build
process.description: Fabrication in our Edinburgh workshop with regular updates.

cta.headline: Ready to start your project?
cta.description: Tell us about your vision and timeline. We'll get back to you within 2 working days.

about.headline: Craftspeople who understand entertainment
about.intro: Full Set Productions was founded in Edinburgh with a simple mission: build immersive experiences that work flawlessly and last.
about.story: We started as escape room enthusiasts frustrated by poorly-built props that broke after a few uses. We knew we could do better. Today, our workshop produces some of the most durable, innovative escape room builds in the UK.

team.name: James
team.bio: James founded Full Set after years in theatre production. His background in set design and project management drives our commitment to deadline delivery.

team.name: Perim
team.bio: Perim keeps projects on track and clients informed. Her background in events management ensures smooth communication throughout every build.

values.title: Quality Over Speed
values.description: We'd rather take the time to do it right than rush and regret.

values.title: Honest Communication
values.description: If there's a problem, you'll hear about it immediately—along with our plan to fix it.

values.title: Continuous Improvement
values.description: Every project teaches us something. We document and apply those lessons.

footer.tagline: Escape rooms, immersive attractions, and theatrical builds. Based in Edinburgh, delivering UK-wide.
